author: WuBlockchain
title: Binance will list Centrifuge (CFG) at 21:00 (UTC+8) on March 16, 2026, opening spot trading pairs CFG/USDT, CFG/USDC, and CFG/TRY. Centrifuge provides infrastructure for institutional tokenization with automated systems, multi-chain support, and deep DeFi integrations. CFG will be listed with a Seed Tag.
claim: Binance will list Centrifuge (CFG) at 21:00 (UTC+8) on March 16, 2026, opening spot trading pairs CFG/USDT, CFG/USDC, and CFG/TRY. Centrifuge provides infrastructure for institutional tokenization with automated systems, multi-chain support, and deep DeFi integrations. CFG will be listed with a Seed Tag.

author: WuBlockchain
title: Digital asset investment products recorded US$1.06bn of inflows the third consecutive week. Bitcoin accounted for 75% of total inflows, amounting to US$793m. EEthereum attracted US$315m, partly driven by new US staking ETF listings. XRP has suffered outflows totalling US$76m.
claim: Digital asset investment products recorded US$1.06bn of inflows the third consecutive week. Bitcoin accounted for 75% of total inflows, amounting to US$793m. EEthereum attracted US$315m, partly driven by new US staking ETF listings. XRP has suffered outflows totalling US$76m.

title:

author: unusual_whales
title: Japan’s defense minister says the nation currently has no plans to send warships to the Strait of Hormuz after Trump put pressure on Tokyo to do so ahead of a summit meeting with Takaichi later this week, per Bloomberg
claim: Japan’s defense minister says the nation currently has no plans to send warships to the Strait of Hormuz after Trump put pressure on Tokyo to do so ahead of a summit meeting with Takaichi later this week, per Bloomberg

author: unusual_whales
title: Oxford Economics forecasted a solid U.S. growth through 2026–2027, supported by AI investment, tax incentives, and spending from high-income households.

author: WuBlockchain
title: QCP: BTC and ETH rose above $74,000 and $2,270 despite pressure on equities and gold, reviving the “digital safe haven” narrative amid geopolitical tensions. Stablecoin liquidity is rising, with USDC supply hitting a record $81.1B, while Bitcoin ETFs recorded five straight days of inflows.
claim: QCP: BTC and ETH rose above $74,000 and $2,270 despite pressure on equities and gold, reviving the “digital safe haven” narrative amid geopolitical tensions. Stablecoin liquidity is rising, with USDC supply hitting a record $81.1B, while Bitcoin ETFs recorded five straight days of inflows.
